Entries.Notes: Node.js inline script executed against the local OpenAPI spec file. Output extracted via direct JSON.parse + traversal. Confirms: integer PK pattern (51/53 schemas), page size default (10), error code coverage (200+204 only), watermark params, soft-archive vs hard-delete patterns, no OAuth/securitySchemes, no server block.
